arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali Newcastle United chants - full song lyrics to Italian cult hero
arts.sum: His ban from football last season may have limited his game time on the pitch, but the black and white faithful showed their support from the stands and the Italian midfielder has shown this season why the Magpies were keen to spend a reported £55million on him. It was during his aforementioned ban from football that the Newcastle faithful came up with a new chant to show their support, this time to the tune of Dutch carnival anthem Links Rechts.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Newcastle: Carabao Cup final updates – live
arts.sum: All the latest from Wembley (4.30pm kick-off GMT) Get in touch with John with your opinions Look at the reception Newcastle players got in 1974 after *losing*. The same was true in 1976 when they lost the League Cup final in 1976 to Manchester City. Bruno’s been a brilliant signing for Newcastle. “Seventy years is too much to wait,” says Guimarães, who describes the meeting with Liverpool as “our World Cup final”. “Hopefully we can finally bring a trophy back to Newcastle.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle to replace Isak with €85m striker who is 'IN CRISIS'
arts.sum: Newcastle are interested in signing Randal Kolo Muani as a potential replacement for Alexander Isak, according to Italian media. Kolo Muani has not found the back of the net in a month and Gazzetta dello Sports reports how the striker is 'in crisis.' He is still favoured by coach Thiago Motta over the much-maligned Dusan Vlahovic, but Juventus are considering different solutions for the summer.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United players treated to private James Bay concert on eve of Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Newcastle United players were treated to a private concert from James Bay at the team's hotel on the eve of the Carabao Cup final. Speaking to fans at the Boxpark at Wembley, Bay told the 2,500 lucky ticket holders that he had a good feeling about Newcastle's chances but would not sing another song until after the match.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Newcastle keeping tabs on 20-year-old prospect admired by Lionel Messi
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United are reportedly keeping tabs on the Inter Miami midfielder, Benjamin Cremaschi. The 20-year-old United States International has impressed with his performances in the MLS and the Premier League clubs are monitoring his progress, as per TBR Football. It will be interesting to see if they decide to make a move […] The post Tottenham, Newcastle keeping tabs on 20-year-old prospect admired by Lionel Messi appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: I left Liverpool after Steven Gerrard phone call changed my mind over Newcastle transfer
arts.sum: Danny Guthrie was on his way to complete a move to Newcastle United in 2008 when he suddenly had second thoughts and decided he didn't want to leave Liverpool – until a phone call from Steven Gerrard

arts.ttl: Arsenal really keen on 19-year-old Liverpool target they have been following for years
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing the Ajax defender Jorrel Hato at the end of the season. According to a report from TBR football, Liverpool are keen on the 19-year-old full back as well, but Arsenal have been following him for two years and they are really keen on getting the deal done. The player has […] The post Arsenal really keen on 19-year-old Liverpool target they have been following for years appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle - Carabao Cup final: Live score, team news and updates as Arne Slot looks to lift first piece of silverware with the Reds
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from Wembley as Liverpool and Newcastle meet in the 2025 Carabao Cup final.

arts.ttl: Jason Tindall makes Liverpool admission as Newcastle United staff identify key to win Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Newcastle United assistant manager Jason Tindall is helping Eddie Howe put together a gameplan to beat Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final

arts.ttl: Newcastle fans flood Covent Garden ahead of Carabao Cup final at Wembley
arts.sum: Newcastle fans flocked to Covent Garden, London, surrounding the piazza ahead of the Carabao Cup final against Liverpool on Sunday, 16 March, at Wembley Stadium.
